entry.title: The Grand Papa Pizza Arrives at Papa Johns
entry.summary:
Papa Johns debuts its largest pizza yet with the launch of the new Grand Papa Pizza. The pizza chain also introduces a new dessert: the Salted Caramel Blondie.
The 18" XXL pizza is made with the chain's original dough that's been hand-stretched into a thin crust. It comes topped with new deli pepperoni, a 3-cheese blend, and Italian seasoning. It's priced at $14.99. Papa Johns describes its deli pepperoni as larger than regular pepperoni with a milder, more savory flavor. The new Salted Caramel Blondie is a warm, buttery blondie made with brown sugar, caramel chips, and a touch of sea salt. It's priced at $9.49, but is also available as part of the Papa Pairings deal, where you can select two or more menu items for $6.99 each. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Dubai Chocolate Cheesecake and More Through November 15, 2025
entry.summary:
Crumbl introduces its new Dubai Chocolate Cheesecake and Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins as part of this week's rotation of cookies and desserts.
Here's the Crumbl menu for the week ending November 15, 2025: - New Dubai Chocolate Cheesecake (pictured) - A chocolate cheesecake on a chocolate graham crust, topped with a crispy kataifi and pistachio filling, a drizzle of pistachio cream, and a whipped cream rosette. - New Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins - Thin, crispy cookies with caramelized edges, chewy centers, and semi-sweet chocolate chips. - Caramel Apple Cookie - A warm cinnamon apple cookie topped with caramel cream cheese frosting, chopped Granny Smith apples, a caramel drizzle, and a house-made streusel. - S'mores Cookie - A warm graham cracker cookie packed with milk chocolate chips and topped with a melty marshmallow, chocolate drizzle, and buttery graham cracker crumbs. - Snickerdoodle Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie rolled in cinnamon-sugar. - Mint Chip Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled sugar cookie loaded with semi-sweet chips, topped with a creamy mint chip mousse and a whipped cream rosette. - Strawberry Cake Cookie - A warm strawberry and vanilla cookie topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting and white chocolate curls. - Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Crumbl also continues to offer a weekly "secret menu" that's a dessert or cookie selected by each location. You can check each location's secret menu item on the Crumbl website or mobile app. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Domino's Offers Large 1-Topping Carryout Pizzas for $6.70 Each
entry.summary:
Spurred by a viral meme, Domino's is offering a limited-time, online, carryout deal where you can get large 1-topping pizzas for $6.70 each using the code "67".
The "67" (also "6-7") refers to a nonsensical meme that originated from the song "Doot Doot (6 7)" by Skrilla and gained popularity due to being featured on TikTok and Instagram Reels. It evolved into people just saying the phrase as slang with various meanings (or lack thereof), including as an inside joke where students cheer when they hear the words spoken (to the consternation of many a math teacher). The 67 deal compares well to Domino's regularly offered $7.99 large 1-topping carryout deal (it's an additional 17% discount) and is available through Sunday, November 16, 2025, at participating locations nationwide. In addition to keeping hip with the young folk with a viral deal, Domino's has just launched a rebrand that the pizza chain describes as, "We've taken inspiration from the past and present, and transformed it into modernized elements that will better reach future pizza lovers, including hotter colors, new packaging features a more simple, iconic approach and even a new jingle, "Dommmino’s," brought to life by hip-hop/country/Americana music star Shaboozey." You can see the changes to Domino's packaging, color palette, and more below:
According to the brand's consumer research and testing, the new look "significantly improved consumers' perceptions of the brand as more vibrant/bold, fun/playful and modern." Additionally, 67% of consumers preferred the new rebrand over the previous design, with 73% of Gen Z and 70% of Millennials in favor of the new look. Photos via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: McDonald's - Buffalo Ranch Sauce
entry.summary:
McDonald's new Buffalo Ranch sauce is described by the chain as "tangy meets creamy and mild-meets-wild as two iconic flavors come together to create something craveable."
I got the sauce with a six-piece order of Chicken McNuggets. The Buffalo Ranch had a yellow-orange color to it.
In terms of taste, it came off as a creamy Buffalo sauce. The ranch mostly contributed a creamy base and tang rather than any herby notes, which left the Buffalo sauce to add more tang as well as a light to medium heat. It went okay with the Chicken McNuggets, which have a more neutral profile compared to McDonald's McCrispy Strips. The tenders might have filled in better for the missing ranch notes.
Overall, McDonald's Buffalo Ranch isn't terribly exciting, but it saves you the trouble of dipping chicken in Buffalo sauce and then ranch (or vice versa). Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Panera Introduces New Creme Brulee Bites
entry.summary:
In addition to the launch of its new Frozen Signature Hot Chocolate, Panera introduces new Creme Brulee Bites as a limited-time dessert that complements the Creme Brulee Latte, which debuted as part of this year's fall menu.
The Creme Brulee Bite is a mini buttery vanilla cake topped with brown sugar streusel crumb and salted caramel sugar. It can be purchased individually or in a pack of three and is similar in concept to the bakery-cafe chain's regular menu Brownie Bites (a mini fudge brownie topped with chocolate chips and brownie crumbs. Prices vary, but a Creme Brulee Bite costs $1.99 at my local Panera branch here in Los Angeles, while a 3-pack costs $5. Panera is also offering a limited-time $1 soup deal where you can get a cup of soup for $1 with an in-app purchase of a whole entree using the code "SOUP" at participating locations. Photo via Panera. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Papa Johns Offers 50% Off Carryout Pizzas Through November 16, 2025
entry.summary:
Papa Johns is offering a limited-time, carryout deal where you can get 50% off regular menu price pizzas. The discounted pizzas can be "any size, any crust, any toppings."
The 50% off carryout pizza deal is available through November 16, 2025. For a sense of the savings, a large pepperoni pizza (one of the most commonly ordered pizzas) costs $18.99 at my local Papa Johns location. With the 50% off deal, the cost would be $9.50. Large specialty pizzas are $23.49, which would be $11.75 with the discount. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: 2025 National Fried Chicken Sandwich Day Deals and Specials
entry.summary:
November 9, 2025, is National Fried Chicken Sandwich Day. Here are some deals and specials to help celebrate the fast-food staple:
- Buffalo Wild Wings - On November 9, 2025, Buffalo Wild Wings Rewards members can get a free Chicken Sandwich (Classic or Spicy) with a purchase of $10 or more. - Jollibee's - Through November 9, Original and Spicy Chicken Sandwiches will be buy one, get one free for new Jollibee Rewards members. - KFC - From November 7 through November 9, 2025, rewards members can get a free Chicken Sandwich (Classic or Spicy) with any purchase of $1 or more made through the KFC website or mobile app. - McDonald's - On November 9, 2025, you can get a $2 McCrispy Sandwich using an offer in the McDonald's mobile app at participating locations nationwide. - Pollo Campero - In celebration of National Fried Chicken Sandwich Day and National Chicken Nugget Day (November 13), you can get chicken sandwiches and 6-piece nuggets for $5 each from November 9 through November 16, 2025. - Popeyes - Through November 9, you can get a free Chicken Sandwich (Classic, Spicy, or Smokin' Rojo) with a purchase of $10 or more at participating locations nationwide when you order through the Popeyes website or mobile app. - Wingstop - Through Sunday, November 9, you can get a free chicken sandwich in any flavor with a $10 purchase, using code "FREESANDWICH" at checkout in the Wingstop app or website. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell's Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie Arrives
entry.summary:
Ahead of Friendsgiving, Taco Bell introduces its new, limited-edition Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie, available in limited quantities nationwide, exclusively in-restaurant. The dessert is only available for purchase as a whole pie (not as slices) for $19.99.
The Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie is a creamy, key-lime-style pie with a filling that's infused with the tropical-lime flavor of Baja Blast. The filling comes on a graham-crumb crust and is topped with whipped cream. Additionally, select Live Mas Cafes in Southern California and Texas have launched the Baja Blast Pie Chiller, a frozen drink twist on the Baja Blast Pie. Available for a limited time, the creamy frozen beverage features pieces of Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie blended into a vanilla ice cream base, topped with whipped cream and churro crunch. The Baja Blast Pie Chiller carries a suggested price of $4.19 for a 16-oz small and $4.59 for a 20-oz medium. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Dairy Queen Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
entry.summary:
Dairy Queen rolls out its new Holiday Treat Collection for the 2025 holiday season.
Available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide, this year's holiday menu includes: - New Peppermint Bark Blizzard - The November Blizzard of the Month features peppermint bark pieces (white and milk chocolaty layers sprinkled with crushed peppermint candy cane) mixed with vanilla soft serve. - Frosted Sugar Cookie Blizzard - The December Blizzard of the Month is a returning seasonal flavor that features soft sugar cookie pieces, icing, and festive sprinkles blended with vanilla soft serve. - New Holiday Nog Shake - Holiday Nog syrup blended with vanilla soft serve and milk, finished with whipped topping and a sprinkle of nutmeg. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: McDonald's Offers $5 McGriddles Extra Value Meal and $8 Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal
entry.summary:
McDonald's introduces two limited-time Extra Value Meal offers this month: the $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal and the $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal.
The $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal includes the sandwich, hash browns, and a small coffee. The $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal includes 10 Chicken McNuggets, medium fries, and a medium fountain drink. McDonald's previous Extra Value Meal deals were the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Extra Value Meal and the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal. Prices vary, but those meals are now $7.79 and $10.29, respectively, at my local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. The $8 Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal costs $9 here, while the $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal is $6. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is Back at Select KFC Locations in California and Washington
entry.summary:
Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is back for the 2025 Thanksgiving season at select KFC locations in Northern California and Washington.
Priced at $79.99, the turkey is a whole bird described as "tender, juicy, and deliciously prepared in our classic KFC style." The turkey is fully cooked but must be reheated. It is not available for online ordering or delivery (i.e., you have to either call or order in person). KFC's Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is also available in a Holiday Meal and a Holiday Feast. The Holiday Meal costs $109.99 and includes:
A Cajun Deep Fried Turkey Family Size Mashed Potatoes Family Size Gravy Family Size Coleslaw 12 Biscuits
The Holiday Feast costs $119.99 and includes:
A Cajun Deep Fried Turkey Family Size Mashed Potatoes Family Size Gravy Family Size Mac & Cheese Family Size Sweet Corn 12 Biscuits A Family Size Cake (Lemon or Chocolate)
Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Tests $3 Chicken Queso Burrito
entry.summary:
Taco Bell is testing a new value item, the $3 Chicken Queso Burrito, for a limited time at participating locations in the Indianapolis area.
The new Chicken Queso Burrito features grilled white-meat chicken, seasoned rice, green chile queso, a three-cheese blend, and pico de gallo, wrapped in a flour tortilla and grilled. The queso is also available with crispy tortilla chips for $2. The pairing is called "Chips N Queso." Taco Bell previously offered a limited-time green chile queso in March of this year as a dipping sauce for Crunchwrap Sliders. Taco Bell continues to test its Luxe Value Menu in the area, although the lineup no longer includes churros. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Baskin-Robbins Puts Together New Dubai Chocolate Collection
entry.summary:
Baskin-Robbins embraces the viral Dubai chocolate trend with the launch of its new Dubai Chocolate Collection this month, featuring its November Flavor of the Month, Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream.
Inspired by the combination of kadayif (finely shredded, crispy phyllo dough) and pistachio cream enrobed in chocolate, Baskin-Robbins' Dubai Chocolate includes: - Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream - A combination of pistachio and chocolate ice creams swirled with pistachio pieces and chocolate crunch ribbons. - Dubai Chocolate Sundae - Three scoops of Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream layered with hot fudge and kadayif, topped with pistachio sauce, whipped cream, a fudge drizzle, and more kadayif. - Dubai Chocolate Shake - Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream blended with milk and pistachio sauce poured into a cup that's coated with a chocolate drizzle and topped with whipped cream, pistachio sauce, and kadayif. In addition to the new Dubai Chocolate menu, Baskin-Robbins has brought back its Turkey Cake in time for Thanksgiving. Resembling a roast turkey, the ice cream cake features an ice cream center covered in a caramel praline glaze and adorned with two sugar cone drumsticks. Through November 16, 2025, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can get $5 off a Turkey Cake, redeemable in-shop or through the Baskin-Robbins mobile app or website. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Shake Shack Debuts New Big Shack Burger
entry.summary:
Shake Shack launches a new, Big Mac-esque, deluxe version of its signature ShackBurger called the "Big Shack" as a limited-time special.
Priced at $9.99, the Big Shack features two quarter-pound Angus beef patties, secret sauce, green leaf lettuce, two slices of American cheese, Roma tomatoes, thick-cut pickles, and onions, on three buttered and toasted potato buns. Key differences from the Big Mac (which costs $6.19 here in Los Angeles) include larger patties, leaf lettuce instead of shredded iceberg lettuce, fresh onion instead of dehydrated onions, the inclusion of tomatoes, and the absence of sesame seeds. I'm not a fan of the third bun on either burger, but it makes more sense when paired with bigger beef patties. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: McAlister's Adds New Cuban Sandwich and Honey BBQ Pork Melt
entry.summary:
McAlister's Deli welcomes two new sandwiches, the Cuban Sandwich and Honey BBQ Pork Melt, as permanent additions to its menu.
The Cuban Sandwich (pictured) features tangy pulled pork, Black Forest ham, Swiss cheese, yellow mustard, and pickles on a toasted baguette. A 6-inch sandwich starts at $10.89 (the price varies with location). The Honey BBQ Pork Melt consists of smoked pulled pork, honey mustard BBQ sauce, Swiss cheese, cheddar, provolone, parmesan, and tomato on toasted ciabatta. The price of the sandwich starts at $10.49 (varies with location). Photo via McAlister's Deli. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Subway Introduces New Festive Feast Subs for Thanksgiving
entry.summary:
Subway adds a trio of Thanksgiving subs to the menu with the introduction of its new, limited-time Festive Feast collection.
Available nationwide on November 13, 2025, the new menu items feature new cranberry sauce and new turkey stuffing made with parsley, rosemary, sage, breadcrumbs, and broth. Subway's Festive Feast collection includes the following: - TurHamKen - A much simpler twist on turducken (a chicken stuffed inside a duck stuffed inside a turkey and then roasted) that consists of roasted turkey, Black Forest ham, and rotisserie-style chicken, served with Monterey Cheddar cheese, spinach, red onions, mayo, stuffing, and cranberry sauce, on your choice of bread. - Festive Turkey - It's the same as the TurHamKen, only minus the ham and chicken. - Festive Chicken - Again, it's the same as the TurHamKen, but minus the turkey and ham. There's also an option to add cranberry sauce or stuffing to any Subway sub for an additional $1. If you're looking to save some money while trying the new subs, Subway has an online-only, buy-one-get-one-for-one-dollar deal on Footlongs exclusively for its MVP Rewards members when they use the code "FOOTLONGFAN". Photo via Subway. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Denny's Offers Free Grand Slam to Rewards Members Through November 10, 2025
entry.summary:
Denny's is offering its rewards members a free Original Grand Slam redeemable from now through Monday, November 10, 2025, at participating locations nationwide.
The freebie is part of a promotion that promised a free Grand Slam for the first grand slam hit during this year's World Series, i.e., you get a Grand Slam when they hit a grand slam (a home run when the bases are loaded). It can be claimed when ordering online through the Denny's website or mobile app, or by visiting a participating location and using your Denny's Rewards. Denny's Original Grand Slam is a breakfast platter that includes two buttermilk pancakes, two eggs, two strips of applewood-smoked bacon, and two pork sausage links. Photo via Denny's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wendy's Launches New Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion
entry.summary:
Wendy's celebrates the 2025 holiday season with the launch of its new Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion.
Available for a limited time, the Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion features a Chocolate or Vanilla Frosty blended with a cinnamon-y snickerdoodle sauce and topped with snickerdoodle cookie crumbles. It can also be ordered as a Frosty Swirl, which consists of a Chocolate or Vanilla Frosty swirled with snickerdoodle sauce. Prices vary, but at my local Wendy's here in Los Angeles, the Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion starts at $4.19 for a small, while the Snickerdoodle Frosty Swirl costs $2.99 for a small. Photo via Wendy's. entry.title: "Chicken Sunday" Deal Back at Shake Shack Through End of 2025
entry.summary:
Shake Shack has brought back its Chicken Sunday deal, where you can get a free Chicken Shack sandwich with an online purchase of $10 or more on Sundays, through the end of the year. It is also offering a buy-one-get-one deal on the Smoke Shack burger throughout November.
The Chicken Sundays deal can be redeemed when ordering through an in-restaurant kiosk, the Shake website, or the Shake Shack mobile app on a Sunday through December 28, 2025, using the code "CHICKENSUNDAY". The Smoke Shack November BOGO deal is also available using the same ordering options, only using the code "SMOKESHACK" instead. Shake Shack's Chicken Shack is the chain's fried chicken sandwich. It features a crispy-fried chicken breast filet, lettuce, pickles, and buttermilk herb mayo on a toasted potato bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $9.49 here in Los Angeles. The Smoke Shack is a burger that features a quarter-pound Angus beef patty, American cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, chopped cherry peppers, and ShackSauce on a toasted potato bun. It normally costs $9.99 near me. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: 2025 National Sandwich Day Deals and Specials
entry.summary:
Monday, November 3, 2025, is National Sandwich Day, when we celebrate various fillings between two slices of bread. Here are some deals and specials to help save some money and mark the occasion:
- Capriotti's - On November 3, 2025, Capriotti's is offering its rewards members a buy-one-get-one-for-50%-off deal on all turkey subs. - Firehouse Subs - On November 3, 2025, rewards members can get a free medium Hook & Ladder, Firehouse Meatball, Turkey & Provolone, or Italian sub when they place an order of $15 or more through the Firehouse website or mobile app. - Jimmy John's - On November 3, rewards members can get a half-priced Picklewich when they order any toasted sandwich using the promo code "TOASTED". - McAlister's Deli - From November 3 through November 9, 2025, rewards members can take advantage of a buy-one-get-one-for-50%-off deal on sandwiches. - Panera - On November 3, rewards members can buy a whole sandwich and get a second one for $5 at participating locations. - Potbelly - On November 3, you can buy one Big or Original sandwich and get an Original sandwich for free using the promo code "BOGO" when ordering through the Potbelly website or mobile app. - Schlotzsky's - Through November 3, 2025, rewards members can get up to 10 medium sandwiches for $5 each using an offer in their account at participating locations. Other non-National Sandwich Day deals that can still be used to celebrate the occasion include: - Pizza Hut - There's the Melt Mondays deal, where you can get any Melt for $4.99 at participating locations. - Subway - For a limited time, Subway rewards members can buy a Footlong sub and get a second one for $1 using the code "BOGO1". Photo via Schlotzsky's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Debuts New Martha Stewart Menu
entry.summary:
Crumbl launches a new Martha Stewart-themed menu as this week's limited-time special. The menu commemorates the relaunch of Martha Stewart's first book, Entertaining.
Available from November 3 through November 8, 2025, Crumbl's Martha Stewart menu includes: - New New York Cheesecake - A classic New York-style cheesecake on a graham cracker crust, topped with fresh strawberries. - New Classic Fudge Brownie - A fudge brownie topped with a chocolate glaze and white chocolate drizzle. - New Martha Stewart's Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins - Crisp cookies with caramelized edges, chewy centers, and semi-sweet chocolate chips. - New Coconut Layer Cake - A two-tier white cake with layers of vanilla mousse, topped with toasted coconut. - New Pumpkin Sheet Cake - A spiced pumpkin sheet cake topped with vanilla bean cream cheese frosting and a buttery brown sugar streusel. - New Mile-High Lemon Pie - Lemon filling in a shortbread crust, topped with whipped cream and a fresh lemon slice. - New Chocolate Tart Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookie crust filled with fudge and chocolate mousse, topped with whipped cream and dark chocolate curls. In addition to this week's limited-time menu, Crumbl continues to offer its Secret Menu, which features a limited-time cake or cookie selected by each location. You can check the Crumbl website and mobile app to see what's available near you. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!
